comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound command_suggestions framed packet id and empty-suggestions id/range/list-count body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

official_source.function_or_member: ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket(int, Suggestions), ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket(int, int, int, List<Entry>), ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.toSuggestions(), ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.Entry.STREAM_CODEC, ByteBufCodecs.VAR_INT, ByteBufCodecs.STRING_UTF8, ComponentSerialization.TRUSTED_OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.EMPTY)).codec().encode/decode(...), ClientGamePacketListener.handleCommandSuggestions(ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket)

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Play clientbound command_suggestions framed dispatch/decode; not non-empty suggestion Entry text/tooltip handling, Brigadier command tree semantics, command context behavior, command UI behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Play clientbound command_suggestions packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official empty-suggestions fixture only; it does not prove non-empty suggestion Entry text/tooltip handling, Brigadier command tree semantics, command context behavior, command UI behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
